title: justicia iltisii
intro: Justicia iltisii, also known as Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Justicia iltisii lie in its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Justicia iltisii can be found in tea, tincture, or capsule form, often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
